title: The Evolution Theory That You Probably HAVEN'T Heard Of

transcript.text: human Homo sapiens have been
physiologically the same for roughly 200
000 years so why in the last five
percent of our existence just ten
thousand years ago did we somehow just
figure out agriculture history religion
and culture how did this just
spontaneously happen all of a sudden
scientists might call the origin of
culture something like an emergent
phenomena as soon as we figured out
agriculture we just had more time to do
other things like write things down read
tell stories start culture but does more
Leisure Time automatically mean more
culture I'm not so sure but they're even
more unexplainable gaps in human history
the human brain literally doubled in
size from Homo habilis two million years
ago to Homo sapiens two hundred thousand
years ago evolutionary biologists like
to explain this away with the phenomena
they call punctuated equilibria and so
as to leave Homo sapiens perched smugly
on the top run here's an alternative
Theory maybe something has been guiding
man's physiological and cultural
Evolution behind the scenes a stroke of
fungal inspiration a spore from the
heavens
